title: Justia Lawyer Directory Scraper
description: Scrapes attorney profiles from Justia.com lawyer directory listings by state and practice area.

maxLawyers.title: Max Lawyers
maxLawyers.description: Maximum number of lawyer profiles to scrape (0 = unlimited)

maxListingPages.title: Max Listing Pages
maxListingPages.description: Maximum number of listing pages to crawl

enrichProfiles.title: Enrich Profiles
enrichProfiles.description: Visit individual profile pages for additional data (firm name, bio, bar admissions, etc.)

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy configuration. US residential proxies required for Justia (Cloudflare).
